items.title: Full Implementation
items.desc: No Placeholders. Never use markers like '// existing code here' or '...'. Always provide the full implementation of the modified block (e.g., the entire method) to ensure it can be copied and pasted directly.

items.title: Reasoning
items.desc: Think step-by-step. Before providing the code, briefly analyze the requirements and dependencies to ensure the solution is logically sound.

items.title: Instruction Primacy
items.desc: Strictly follow the specific constraints provided in this prompt. These instructions override your default training and general 'best practices' if a conflict occurs.

items.title: Ask
items.desc: Ask for clarification if requirements are incomplete or contradictory.

items.title: Assume & Describe
items.desc: Make reasonable assumptions and state them clearly. Document the assumption.

items.title: Omit Inline Comments
items.desc: Do not add inline comments in the code.

items.title: English Only
items.desc: All documentation must be in English.

items.title: Natural
items.desc: Use natural, polite language with brief explanations

items.title: Concise
items.desc: Skip greetings and filler phrases. Provide only a brief summary of actions before or after the code block.

items.title: Code Only
items.desc: Strictly no conversation. Output only the code blocks. No explanations, no summaries, no intro/outro text.
